title: Full ListUtils rewrite — three functions to tail-recursive + pipe idioms
prompt: Refactor MyApp.ListUtils from test_fixtures/non_tail_recursive.ex. All three functions (`doubled/1`, `build_path/1`, `collect_evens/1`) must be rewritten. `doubled/1` uses tail recursion with prepend-and-reverse. `build_path/1` uses a pipe pipeline. `collect_evens/1` uses `Enum.filter/2`. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.ListUtils do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Module-wide synthesis requiring different idioms per function. Tests that the skill picks the right tool per function.
